headline: Iraq seeks reassessment of OPEC production quotas
summary: Investing.com -- Iraq's Oil Ministry said Friday that OPEC has started to gradually restore the country's pre-war production allocations. The ministry stated this move would strengthen Iraq's output capacity and support the recovery of its oil sector.

raw.headline: Iraq seeks reassessment of OPEC production quotas
raw.summary: Investing.com -- Iraq's Oil Ministry said Friday that OPEC has started to gradually restore the country's pre-war production allocations. The ministry stated this move would strengthen Iraq's output capacity and support the recovery of its oil sector.

headline: TSX trades higher despite tech weakness and sliding oil prices
summary: Investing.com -- Canadian equity markets are trading higher on Friday despite renewed weakness in the global technology sector and a sharp decline in crude prices, which weighed on sentiment. The move follows a positive Thursday session where the benchmark S&P/TSX Composite gained 114.12 points, or 0.33%, to finish at 34,850.21, while the S&P/TSX 60 Index edged up 0.21% to close at 2,054.08. Ahead of the opening bell, S&P/TSX 60 is currently up 0.42%, while the S&P/TSX Composite indes is up 0.6%
